caption: A man with short brown hair and a trimmed beard is seated in a recording studio, wearing a black hooded sweatshirt and large black over-ear headphones. He is positioned behind a professional silver microphone mounted on a black boom arm. The background consists of dark gray, textured acoustic foam panels arranged in a rectangular grid pattern. Throughout the sequence, the man remains in a centered, medium close-up shot. Initially, he has his eyes closed and head slightly tilted, then opens his eyes and looks forward. In the final moments, he shifts his gaze upward and to his right, while maintaining a neutral facial expression. No text or logos are visible in the scene.
